title: Get Signals - Working
description: Progress payload for an active get_signals task after a submitted semantic discovery request has started processing. Valid only for `discovery_mode: "brief"`; wholesale signals feed reads report partial completion via `incomplete[]`, not async task progress.

percentage.description: Progress percentage of the signal discovery operation.

current_step.description: Current step in the signal discovery process, such as `querying_providers`, `ranking_signals`, or `checking_deployments`.

total_steps.description: Total number of steps in the signal discovery process.
